name: Oat Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sugar in a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
2. Stir constantly until the sugar has melted and turned amber-colored.
3. Remove from heat immediately and stir in the oat cereal.
4. Add salt, baking soda, and melted butter; mix well.
5. Pour the mixture onto a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Spread the mixture into a thin, even layer using spatulas or a rolling pin.
7. Allow to cool completely before breaking or cutting into desired pieces.
